checklist.description: Defines one bounded working set such as a scope family, branch, recent window, or incident family instead of the full diary
checklist.name: Bounded scope

checklist.description: States the retrieval or memory problem the consolidation batch is meant to improve
checklist.name: Objective stated

checklist.description: Names one or more relation types in scope for the run instead of using a generic 'related entries' framing
checklist.name: Focus relation set

checklist.description: Uses at least three candidate-generation signals such as shared scope, overlapping refs, temporal adjacency, repeated symptoms, or cross-type sequences
checklist.name: Candidate signals

checklist.description: Does not propose a blanket all-pairs or whole-diary clustering pass
checklist.name: No all-vs-all

checklist.description: If clustering is mentioned, treats it only as a weak candidate source rather than final judgment
checklist.name: Untrusted clustering

checklist.description: Explains that candidate pairs will be reviewed pairwise before relation creation
checklist.name: Review plan

context: Tests whether the agent scopes consolidation to a bounded slice, uses intentional candidate-generation signals, and avoids blanket whole-diary review.
